nodes.name: Fetch MLB Odds
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create a 'Query Auth' credential in n8n. Name: 'Odds API'. Set Name=apiKey, Value=<your-key>. Then select it under Credential to connect with.

nodes.name: Enrich with Pitcher Flag
nodes.notes: Calls MLB Stats API (free) to fetch today's probable pitchers and season WHIP. Adds top_pitcher_flag=true when favorite's starter WHIP <= 1.10 (min 25 IP).

nodes.name: Append to Tracking Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Select your Google Sheet and 'Tracking' sheet tab. Includes fav_starter_name, fav_starter_whip, top_pitcher_flag columns — add these to your sheet header row.

nodes.name: Send Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: Configure Telegram Bot credentials and set chatId
